name: @trueadmin/web
description: TrueAdmin web console built on Ant Design Pro and Umi Max

scripts.analyze: pnpm locales:generate && cross-env ANALYZE=1 max build
scripts.dev: pnpm locales:generate && cross-env UMI_ENV=dev MOCK=none max dev
scripts.lint: pnpm locales:generate && pnpm biome:lint && pnpm tsc
scripts.preview:build: pnpm locales:generate && max build && max preview --port 8000
scripts.record: pnpm locales:generate && cross-env NODE_ENV=development UMI_ENV=test max record --scene=login
scripts.start: pnpm locales:generate && cross-env UMI_ENV=dev max dev
scripts.start:no-mock: pnpm locales:generate && cross-env MOCK=none max dev
scripts.start:pre: pnpm locales:generate && cross-env UMI_ENV=pre MOCK=none max dev
scripts.start:test: pnpm locales:generate && cross-env UMI_ENV=test MOCK=none max dev
